pages.label: MouseTester main page
pages.screen_summary: A minimal mouse-testing utility. The main area shows mouse coordinates and click counts. A large button in the center labeled '点击此处测试' triggers the test dialog. The title bar has minimize/maximize/close controls.

controls.label: 点击此处测试
controls.description: Main test trigger button — opens the mouse test dialog

controls.label: Mouse position display
controls.description: Shows current mouse X, Y coordinates and total click count

controls.label: Reset counter
controls.description: Resets the accumulated click counter to zero
controls.possible_navigation: Resets the counter display — stays on main page

pages.label: Mouse test dialog
pages.screen_summary: A modal test dialog overlaying the main window. Contains a circular mouse-testing target area with concentric rings. Start and Cancel buttons at the bottom. A status bar at the bottom shows current test phase ('Ready', 'Testing...', or results).

controls.label: Start test
controls.description: Begins the mouse accuracy test — tracks clicks inside the target area

controls.label: Cancel
controls.description: Closes the dialog and returns to the main page without running the test

controls.label: Test area
controls.description: Circular mouse testing target zone with concentric scoring rings

pages.label: Test results
pages.screen_summary: Test results screen displayed after completing a mouse accuracy test. Shows accuracy metrics: hit count, miss count, average distance from center, and a score distribution chart. 'Retry' and 'Back to main' buttons at the bottom.

controls.label: Retry
controls.description: Run the mouse accuracy test again
controls.possible_navigation: Restarts the test dialog (returns to page-2)

controls.label: Back to main
controls.description: Return to the main page of the application

controls.label: Score chart
controls.description: Visual chart showing click accuracy distribution across the target area
